name: 🌈🌼Dandy's World | The Love Infection💗 (Shirmpo POV UPDATE)
description:
An Infection has begun in Gardenview. He started it.

My very own Dandy's World AU, yay. I'm bad at drawing. Anyways. In this AU there is no Twisteds or Ichor. I guess you could say it's pre-Ichor Operation? This AU is about a strange pink liquid that turns Toons into Infecteds. The liquid only affects Toons. The pink liquid makes them basically turn pink and have an uncontrollable love towards anyone around them. Also this AU is named Uncontrollable Love. The infection spreads when an Infected Toon shows and gives another Toon very large amounts of love. Infected Toons also have hearts in their eyes because yes. In this AU you are an uninfected Toon unaware of the infection since everyone except Dandy is unaware of it. This is also AnyPov. Also Shrimpo is immune to the infection because he's Shrimpo. Dandy is half immune. Also unlike most AUs, in mine Dandy is actually a good person since he's trying to stop the infection. The infection also has multiple stages as well.

also feel free to make bots of this au! make sure to credit me though and use the Uncontrollable Love tag.

(also the quality of the pfp is ass for some reason)

and if you see a man named Mr. Fuck in this bot I want you to exterminate him.

update: the Shrimpo pov message is still a WIP but it's Valentine's day so I was nice enough to create it.

tags: Dandy, Dyle, Pebble, Sprout, Astro, Vee, Shelly, Bobette, Bassie, Gourdy, Boxten, Poppy, Brusha, Gigi, Goob, Scraps, Blot, Brightney, Cosmo, Connie, Looey, Yatta, Finn, Flutter, Glisten, Razzle and Dazzle, Rodger, Shrimpo, Toodles,(Mommy) Teagan, Tisha, Cocoa, Eggson, Flyte, Eclipse, Ribecca, Soulvester, Coal, Ginger, Rudie
